function.name: _i18n_set_field_option_name
function.description: Set data table field option value display name using internationalization expression (currently only supports ListSelect fields).

optionList.description: Data table field option value configuration list

displayName.description: Option value display name expression (supports internationalization expressions). Must use internationalization expression form: ${T.t('path')}. Where path is the complete path of the translation item in the internationalization translation definition (translateList), for example: ${T.t('grade.name')}
